Join the Collective

Call for Artists

Find paid murals, community collaborations, and installation projects. We handle the logistics so you can handle the art.

Deadline: Oct 15 Budget: $5,000

Downtown Library Mural

Seeking local artists to transform the east-facing exterior wall of the main library. The theme should concentrate on literacy, community growth, and urban flora.

Apply Now
Deadline: Rolling Budget: Negotiable

Overspray Studio Instructors

We're looking for experienced spray paint artists to host weekend workshops at Overspray Art Space. Great opportunity to share your skills with the community.

Apply Now
Deadline: Nov 01 Budget: $12,000

Riverfront Skatepark Installation

Call for a large-scale interactive installation combining sculpture and street art for the newly renovated Riverfront skatepark.

Apply Now

PAC

Connecting muralists, street artists, and public artists with paid opportunities. For artists, by artists.
